title: Select hydrocarbon-based substances - Canada.ca
content:
## Select hydrocarbon-based substances
- Select hydrocarbon-based substances
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).
- Summary of publications

Public comments on the draft screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Select hydrocarbon-based substances
64742-16-1 Footnote a
None planned at this time

Petroleum, sulfurized
Publication of the final assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: vol. 158, No. 16.
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 156, No. 2.
The assessment also identifies an additional 35 hydrocarbon-based substances for which risk assessment activities are considered to have already taken place under CEPA. Based on their composition, physical-chemical properties and reported uses, these additional 35 substances were considered to fall within hydrocarbon-based substance groups that  have previously been addressed under CEPA, and will thus not undergo further assessment at this time. Further details can be found in the assessment.
